title: Deglazed Smoky Roasted Pepper American Pilaf
description: A bitter, crumbly American dish featuring roasted peppers, deglazed with a smoky essence that serves as a hangover-cure alternative. Gluten-free and egg-free.

ingredients.name: Optional: 1/4 teaspoon cayenne pepper for extra heat

instructions: Rinse quinoa under cold water and drain. In a medium saucepan, combine quinoa with chicken or vegetable broth.
Add olive oil, diced roasted red peppers, onion, and minced garlic to the saucepan over medium heat.
Stir occasionally for about 5 minutes until the vegetables are soft and the liquid has mostly absorbed by cooking into the quinoa.
Deglaze the pan with a cup of chicken or vegetable broth. Stir gently until the mixture thickens slightly (can be done quickly as it's just to deglaze).
Taste for salt, pepper, and adjust if needed. Optionally add cayenne pepper for added heat.
Turn off heat, stir in any remaining liquid from the pan, cover, and let sit for a few minutes until quinoa is fully cooked but still slightly crunchy.
Serve warm as a side dish or over scrambled eggs for an American-style breakfast alternative.
